title: Start Here
question: How should I move through this self-guided info session?
summary: Begin with the dashboard, then explore the modules most relevant to your questions.

title: Program Overview
question: What is CSPB, and why should I take it seriously?
summary: Get the high-level picture of the program, its academic home, and how it fits into CU Boulder’s online offerings.

title: Is CSPB Right for Me?
question: Am I the kind of student this program is built for?
summary: See who the program is for, what background helps, and how adult learners typically use the degree.

title: Career Outcomes
question: What kinds of roles and industries do CSPB alumni move into?
summary: Review the kinds of roles, pathways, and opportunity areas associated with the program.

title: Curriculum
question: What courses will I take?
summary: Review required courses, electives, credit hours, and sample academic pathways.

title: Online Classes
question: What is the online learning experience actually like?
summary: See how lectures, course modules, discussions, coding tools, and deadlines work in practice.

title: Student Support
question: What kinds of support will I have while I am in the program?
summary: Review advising, faculty access, tutoring, career services, and peer/community support.

title: Admissions Requirements
question: What do I need in order to apply?
summary: Review degree prerequisites, application requirements, and the admissions checklist.

title: Transfer Credit
question: Can I transfer previous coursework into the program?
summary: Understand how transfer credit may work and where official evaluation policies apply.

title: Non-Degree Option
question: Can I start without fully entering the degree program?
summary: See how the non-degree option can help students test the program or begin before formal admission.

title: Tuition & Fees
question: What will this cost?
summary: Review tuition and cost-related planning, with the understanding that official pages are the source of truth.

title: Apply / Next Steps
question: What should I do next if I am interested?
summary: Apply, request more information, or contact the CSPB team for next-step guidance.
